cobblemon.move.hellfireslash.desc: The user strikes 2 to 3 times with deadly slashes that may burn the target, also draining 50% of the damage dealt with each hit and greatly boosting Attack and Special stats.
cobblemon.move.electroears.desc: The user rubs its electric ears and delivers a charged blow. Its power doubles if paralyzed, and its Speed never drops while attacking.
cobblemon.move.voltivore.desc: The user feeds off the opponent's kinetic energy, recovering half of the damage done to the target. If the target is paralyzed, the damage will be increased.
cobblemon.move.gmaxvolcaniceruption.desc: Causes a chain of volcanic eruptions that encases opponents in flames and rocks, sets Sunny weather.
cobblemon.move.gmaxflood.desc: Creates a storm capable of flooding the battlefield, consecutively damaging the opponent while recurrently recovering its health thanks to its Aqua Ring.
cobblemon.move.gmaxwildforest.desc: Boost all plants around's growing, generating a Grass Terrain with Leech Seed, also adding Grass Type to foe.
cobblemon.move.berrytoss.desc: Throws projectiles forcefully at the opponent to attack with a powerful charge. Damage depends on the target's HP; the lower the HP relative to its maximum HP, the greater the damage. Hits 3 times
cobblemon.move.abyssalrush.desc: The user charges engulfed in crushing abyssal waters, breaking all barriers and causing the target to flinch.
cobblemon.species.hichulla.name: Hichulla
cobblemon.species.hichulla.desc1: Hichulla loves to explore every corner of its surroundings, making it common to find in the wild.
cobblemon.species.hichulla.desc2: Hichulla has an innate talent for singing to the point it can be heard humming little melodies wherever it goes.
cobblemon.species.uynuk.name: Uynuk
cobblemon.species.uynuk.desc1: It was born from an artist's desire of bring life to her creations.
cobblemon.species.uynuk.desc2: Its borders are as sharp as a grass leaf, so its cut abilities are spectacular.
cobblemon.species.nucraft.name: Nucraft
cobblemon.species.nucraft.desc1: Nucraft has evolved into a three-dimensional body to share more artistic expressions with the world.
cobblemon.species.nucraft.desc2: Although its shape suggests complete mobility, it can actually only move its head, tail, and arms. To move, it hops slightly.
cobblemon.species.kurperor.name: Kurperor
cobblemon.species.kurperor.desc1: Kurperor is known as the "King of the Depths" for its imposing presence and longevity. Other Pokémon seek it out for protection and wisdom in battle.
cobblemon.species.kurperor.desc2: Being a trainer of a Kurperor is a symbol of admiration and respect, a species worthy of an admirable ruler.
cobblemon.ability.illusoryember.desc: Takes on the appearance of the last Pokémon in the team upon entering battle. Can burn the target and restores all its HP when the illusion ends.
cobblemon.ability.sagacity.desc: Upon entering battle, the user's cunning intimidates the opponent, lowering their Special Attack by one stage.
cobblemon.ability.chaosenergy.desc: The user's energy overflows to such an extent that it increases their Physical Attack, Special Attack, and Speed ​​upon entering battle and after each turn, in addition to increasing the damage of the Pokémon's moves by 50%..
cobblemon.ability.grandencore.desc: At the request of its audience, it has a 40% chance of hitting a second time.
cobblemon.ability.curiousinstinct.desc: It copies a random ability from all its opponents out of curiosity to know how it works.
cobblemon.species.kreti.name: Kreti
cobblemon.species.kreti.desc1: It likes to play pranks on both people and Pokémon, but don’t take it the wrong way; it’s its way of showing affection.
cobblemon.species.kreti.desc2: Its flames can create illusions so detailed that they can confuse anyone who sees them.
cobblemon.species.kretsune.name: Kretsune
cobblemon.species.kretsune.desc1: Despite his mischievous nature, he is known as "The Prophet" as he is often the voice of the divine beings with whom he maintains a close relationship.
cobblemon.species.kretsune.desc2: He always protects Hichulla's herds from any danger and stays close to Keiridol.
cobblemon.species.keiridol.name: Keiridol
cobblemon.species.keiridol.desc1: Keiridol’s singing is comparable to the voice of a goddess, and the notes from its tail are synchronized with the melodies it sings.
cobblemon.species.keiridol.desc2: Keiridol’s voice has the power to hypnotize anyone who hears it within a 50 km radius.
cobblemon.species.lilver.name: Lilver
cobblemon.species.lilver.desc1: Lilver loves to play with its trainer, although this may cause burns due to its lack of control over its flames' heat.
cobblemon.species.lilver.desc2: It is said that Lilver is the ideal Pokémon for detecting nearby fires, which is why many firefighters use it as a guide in their missions.
cobblemon.species.goldy.name: Goldy
cobblemon.species.goldy.desc1: Goldy has better control over its flames, creating maneuvers to impress its trainer.
cobblemon.species.goldy.desc2: It is believed that Goldy's loyalty to its trainer comes from a spiritual bond condensed within its flames.
cobblemon.species.lylaze.name: Lylaze
cobblemon.species.lylaze.desc1: It is known that the first Lylaze specimen gave its life to save its trainer from a tragic accident.
cobblemon.species.lylaze.desc2: They are peaceful and serene beings, so there is nothing to fear if encountered in the wild.
cobblemon.species.ghissel.name: Ghissel
cobblemon.species.ghissel.desc1: Born in forgotten crypts, Ghissel wanders among graves absorbing the torment of wandering souls, purifying them and storing the dark energy they release.
cobblemon.species.ghissel.desc2: Over time, Ghissel transforms the impurities it absorbs into a spectral poison that seals the suffering of the purified souls.
cobblemon.species.schlanghoul.name: Schlanghoul
cobblemon.species.schlanghoul.desc1: Its head begins to form bony protrusions, especially on its snout, due to the tormented souls it absorbs in an attempt to purify them.
cobblemon.species.schlanghoul.desc2: The crystal on its neck stores the souls it absorbs, which strengthen its body and make its venom far more lethal.
cobblemon.species.ghiftdorah.name: Ghiftdorah
cobblemon.species.ghiftdorah.desc1: The souls it has absorbed completely mutated its body, turning its own soul sinister from the torment it accumulated over time.
cobblemon.species.ghiftdorah.desc2: The erratic behavior of its side heads is due to the souls within fighting for control, but when they coordinate, they become a deadly weapon.
cobblemon.species.hapu.name: Hapu
cobblemon.species.hapu.desc1: It often sneaks into power plants when low on energy. It’s a very active Pokémon, so it needs to recharge frequently.
cobblemon.species.hapu.desc2: Wild Hapu leverage thunderstorms for recharging their energies using their tails like a lightning rod.
cobblemon.species.strideer.name: Strideer
cobblemon.species.strideer.desc1: Strideer is capable of manipulating different types of energy through its antlers to brutally attack its opponents.
cobblemon.species.strideer.desc2: It sometimes stores more energy than its body can handle, causing short circuits around it.
cobblemon.species.aaiper.name: Aaiper
cobblemon.species.aaiper.desc1: Aaiper's body turned into pure energy after an overload caused ionization of its physical form.
cobblemon.species.aaiper.desc2: As pure energy, Aaiper often slips into appliances, causing them to enter a short-circuited state.
cobblemon.ability.divinevoice.desc: Its voice emits a frequency that boosts sound-based and Fairy-type moves and protects it from powder-based moves.
cobblemon.battle.ability.divinevoice: %1$s/s Divine Voice protects it from powder and increases its song.
cobblemon.ability.corruptedsoul.desc: Transforms its Normal and Ghost-type moves into Dark-type, also making it inmune to flinch and Intimidaction while boosting its Poison-type moves.
cobblemon.ability.precise.desc: Guarantees the highest number of hits from multi-hit attacks, consequently generating greater damage.
cobblemon.battle.heal.illusoryember: %1$s absorbed the illusory embers healing its HP.
cobblemon.ability.illusiotype.desc: The Pokémon mimics both the form and types of a Pokémon on the team.
cobblemon.species.yurcat.name: Yurcat
cobblemon.species.yurcat.desc1: It is a species commonly associated with royalty and prestige, as it is the offspring of the proclaimed 'King of the Depths'.
cobblemon.species.yurcat.desc2: Even if you manage to capture it, Yurcat won't easily accept you as its trainer; you'll have to earn its trust and approval.
cobblemon.species.marigueya.name: Marigüeya
cobblemon.species.marigueya.desc1: It often climbs trees to camouflage itself from predators, passing itself off as local berries.
cobblemon.species.marigueya.desc2: It tends to cause problems both in the wild and with his trainer. Don't be surprised to find your belongings scattered everywhere.
cobblemon.species.nancuache.name: Nancuache
cobblemon.species.nancuache.desc1: It always carries a Marigüeya on its back and enjoys challenging Bug-type Pokémon despite its weakness to them.
cobblemon.species.nancuache.desc2: Its paternal instinct is the most admirable in the Pokémon world, only comparable to that of Kangaskhan and Dragapult.
cobblemon.species.arrkuro.name: Arrkuro
cobblemon.species.arrkuro.desc1: Due to its proud nature, it tends to disobey its trainer if it doesn't see them as respectable.
cobblemon.species.arrkuro.desc2: Its swimming ability and defense intensify, making it the second most skilled marine predator, only behind its evolution.
cobblemon.species.zarinanjo.name: Zarinanjo
cobblemon.species.zarinanjo.desc1: It is capable of throwing small objects with such force that it can deal considerable blunt damage to whoever is hit.
cobblemon.species.zarinanjo.desc2: Together with two Marigüeyas, it uses them as projectiles to face its predators, rivaling them.
cobblemon.species.aelubi.name: Aelubi
cobblemon.species.aelubi.desc1: Aelubi flies across the world on a mission to eradicate the evil that corrupts both humans and Pokémon.
cobblemon.species.aelubi.desc2: If you ever see it, show your gratitude for its protection by offering it something, preferably a sweet or dessert.
cobblemon.species.aelubi.desc3: Aelubi is said to wage intense battles against a demonic-looking Legendary Pokémon, in addition to attempting to purify that Pokémon's minions.
cobblemon.species.bellver.name: Bellver
cobblemon.species.bellver.desc1: Unlike its counterpart, Lilver; Bellver is calmer and more relaxed.
cobblemon.species.bellver.desc2: Its sweet aroma and attitude convey calm to both people and Pokémon.
cobblemon.species.belldy.name: Belldy
cobblemon.species.belldy.desc1: Its limbs become more robust, as does its bark, significantly increasing its resistance to attacks.
cobblemon.species.belldy.desc2: Despite its increased resistance, it is a mostly pacifist Pokémon.
cobblemon.species.bellaze.name: Bellaze
cobblemon.species.bellaze.desc1: Its tail grows into a bushy bush apple grove, from which apples occasionally grow.
cobblemon.species.bellaze.desc2: The bush that grows on its tail is the perfect home for small Pokémon seeking its protection, for despite its calm nature, Bellaze doesn't hesitate to attack to help its friends.
cobblemon.species.byion.name: Byion
cobblemon.species.byion.desc1: Its quills generate enough electricity to power an entire skyscraper.
cobblemon.species.byion.desc2: It usually lives in packs alongside Lilver; the reason is unknown, but it is believed that they are theoretically linked.
cobblemon.species.byohm.name: Byohm
cobblemon.species.byohm.desc1: It can run at incredible speeds and increase its speed and kinetic energy in a matter of seconds.
cobblemon.species.byohm.desc2: There have been reports of kitchen utensil thefts, mostly spoons; this species is believed to be involved.
cobblemon.species.mizuga.name: Mizuga
cobblemon.species.mizuga.desc1: Mizuga lives in warm oceans and coral reefs, where it spends its days playing among schools of fish.
cobblemon.species.mizuga.desc2: Divers say its presence is a sign of a healthy and balanced reef.
cobblemon.species.mizuga.desc3: It is a peaceful and curious Pokémon that enjoys propelling itself through the water to make small, harmless splashes.
cobblemon.species.okamorph.name: Okamorph
cobblemon.species.okamorph.desc1: Okamorph's determination causes it to evolve into this form, which resembles a legendary Pokémon from a distant region
cobblemon.species.okamorph.desc2: Okamorph's power becomes much more chaotic despite losing the ability to transform.
cobblemon.species.nefthlet.name: Nefthlet
cobblemon.species.nefthlet.desc1: Nefthlet often flies over the entire region in search of old objects belonging to people who have passed away.
cobblemon.species.nefthlet.desc2: This species maintains constant quarrels with Rookidee, as Nefthlet hope that a trainer will fall so they can steal their belongings, while Rookidee seek to protect them.
cobblemon.species.gotheneth.name: Gotheneth
cobblemon.species.gotheneth.desc1: When a Gotheneth perches next to a person, it is believed that their end is near, though it is only a superstition that few dare to ignore.
cobblemon.species.gotheneth.desc2: It serves as an emissary to its evolution, the Funeral Feather Pokémon. Avoid contact with it
cobblemon.species.nenebris.name: Nenebris
cobblemon.species.nenebris.desc1: Nenebris wanders in search of fresh souls to sustain its existence for another day.
cobblemon.species.nenebris.desc2: Its appearance is said to be an omen of imminent death, as its presence always coincides with the passing of a human or Pokémon nearby.
cobblemon.species.buntari.name: Buntari
cobblemon.species.buntari.desc1: It can create perfect illusions that make it look like another Pokémon, even changing its type to that of the one it's mimicking.
cobblemon.species.buntari.desc2: When its illusion breaks, it wraps its allies in its enormous, fluffy tail and releases healing energy that fully restores their vitality.
cobblemon.species.tokomand.name: Tokomand
cobblemon.species.tokomand.desc1: We don't know how it stole part of Mimikyu's costume without dying in the attempt; however, it wears a crown made of cardboard attached to the fabric with adhesive tape.
cobblemon.species.tokomand.desc2: It frightens all the Pokémon around it with its attitude. It is not recommended for beginner trainers to catch it
cobblemon.move.comando.desc: On first turn, it boosts the Attack and Special Attack of its allies, also increasing its own Evasion based on the number of allies on the field. On next turns, it prevents the opponent from using the move used on the previous turn. In single battles, Evasion increases based on the number of Pokémon in the team that have not fainted.
